summary: Re-verified ADR 0249 from the latest origin/main baseline by replaying the monitoring stack on monitoring-lv3, confirming 33 active https-tls-blackbox targets plus 99 loaded https_tls_assurance rules from the shared service catalogs, and recording the 60-second production testssl.sh receipt 20260329T151359Z with 11 medium timeout warnings and no high or critical findings.

verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/https_tls_assurance_targets.py scripts/generate_https_tls_assurance.py scripts/https_tls_assurance.py config/windmill/scripts/https-tls-assurance.py` succeeded, and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_https_tls_assurance_targets.py tests/test_https_tls_assurance_windmill_wrapper.py tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py tests/test_guest_observability_role.py tests/test_guest_log_shipping_playbook.py tests/test_loki_log_agent_role.py` returned `22 passed in 0.50s`.

verification.check: Generated HTTPS/TLS artifacts and monitoring gates
verification.observed: `make validate-generated-https-tls-assurance`, `make syntax-check-monitoring`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-monitoring`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh alert-rules agent-standards` all passed from the isolated latest-main worktree.

`make converge-monitoring` completed successfully with final recap `backup-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `coolify-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-build-lv3 ok=46 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=72 changed=2 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 ok=396 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=150 changed=4 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=38 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=100 changed=0 failed=0`.

SSH verification recorded `hostname=debian-base-template`, kernel `6.17.13-2-pve`, and `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a`; `monitoring-lv3` reported active `influxdb`, `grafana-server`, `loki`, `alloy`, `tempo`, `otelcol-contrib`, `lv3-prometheus`, `prometheus-alertmanager`, and `prometheus-blackbox-exporter`; `/etc/prometheus/file_sd/https-tls-targets.yml` and `/etc/prometheus/rules/https-tls-alerts.yml` were present; the Prometheus API reported 33 active `https-tls-blackbox` targets; and rule group `https_tls_assurance` loaded 99 rules.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/https_tls_assurance.py --env production --skip-testssl --print-report-json` recorded clean receipt `20260329T151822Z` with 33 discovered targets, matching the live Prometheus job.

`make https-tls-assurance ENV=production` recorded receipt `20260329T151359Z` for 33 targets in `677.4` seconds with status `warn` / status code `2`, 11 medium `tls.scan_timeout` findings on `api-gateway-public`, `backup-pbs-internal`, `changelog-portal-public`, `coolify-apps-public`, `coolify-public`, `dify-public`, `docker-build-public`, `docker-runtime-public`, `docs-portal-public`, `dozzle-public`, and `excalidraw-public`, and no high or critical findings.

notes: The earlier 2026-03-28 branch-local receipt remains in the repo as historical comparison evidence, but this 2026-03-29 mainline replay is the canonical receipt carried into `main`.

After this receipt was first recorded, origin/main advanced through the ADR 0236 exact-main replay and release `0.177.81` / platform `0.130.55`; once ADR 0249 was rebased onto that latest mainline, a refreshed live server check still reported the same 33 active HTTPS/TLS targets and 99 rules on monitoring-lv3, so no second monitoring replay was required before merge.

This exact-main receipt is carried into `main` by release `0.177.82`, and platform version `0.130.56` is the first integrated platform version that records the merged ADR 0249 HTTPS/TLS assurance replay.
